kedge_swap
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Requirements

  • pip and setuptools. To upgrade to final version : pip install –upgrade pip setuptools wheel

  • arch : pip install arch

  • numpy

  • argparse

  • progressbar

  • pytest

Installation

  • To install the package :

    pip install ./

  • Check if package works as intended:

    pytest tests/test.py
